notes: Redeployed 2026-07-20 to fix the registry.ts ABI casing bug (press's REGISTRY_ABI used PascalCase/snake_case function names instead of Stylus's real camelCase ABI dispatch — every on-chain call, read and write, was reverting) and to pick up getProtocolVersion(), which didn't exist in the 2026-06-28 deployment's bytecode (added to source after that deployment). Confirmed via raw eth_call: getProtocolVersion() now returns "0.1". Full three-contract fresh deployment, not a logic-only upgrade — the logic-only upgrade path (proposeLogicUpgrade/confirmLogicUpgrade) has a mandatory 7-day timelock, too slow to unblock integration testing; since the 2026-06-28 deployment had no real users/value (test/integration use only), abandoning its state was the accepted tradeoff. Superseded deployment record (including its DNS bootstrap) preserved at sepolia-2026-06-28-superseded.json. This deployment has NOT yet run governance bootstrap (RegisterPolicy/AuthorizePress) or DNS bootstrap — see integration_tests/reports/phase-1-environment-notes.md for what's been done since.
